title: Simply Swords and Sheilds
description: Simply Swords is a focused combat modpack designed to bring depth, challenge, and satisfaction to melee gameplay in Minecraft
body:
---

# Simply Swords and Shields 🗡️🛡️

> A focused combat modpack for players who crave satisfying melee battles, tactical swordplay, and powerful shields.

**Simply Swords and Shields** revamps Minecraft’s melee system into a skill-based experience. Featuring fluid combat animations, parrying mechanics, custom weapon types, and intelligent enemies, this pack transforms sword fighting into an artform.

---

## 🔥 Highlights

* 🗡️ **Unique Weapon Types**
  Katanas, longswords, scythes, rapiers, cleavers, and more—each with custom reach, speed, and combos.

* 🛡️ **Shield Variety and Mechanics**
  Use bucklers, tower shields, and knight gear with advanced parry/block systems.

* ⚔️ **Better Combat System**
  Powered by mods like *Better Combat*, enjoy fluid animations, hit timing, and dual wielding.

* 🧠 **Smarter Mobs & Bosses**
  Fight enemies that dodge, block, and attack tactically—plus custom dungeon bosses.

* 🎯 **RPG-Style Progression**
  Gain skill perks, enchant swords with effects like Bleed or Flame Slash, and grow stronger with every battle.

* 🧱 **Lightweight & Focused**
  No bulky tech or magic systems—just clean, optimized sword-and-shield action.

---

## 💭 Why Play?

If you love games like *Chivalry*, *Dark Souls*, or *Elden Ring*—and want that same thrilling feeling of melee mastery in Minecraft—**Simply Swords and Shields** is made for you.

---

## ✅ Requirements

* **Mod Loader**: Fabric
* **Required APIs**: Fabric API, Cloth Config, Mod Menu (included)
* **Compatible with**: Singleplayer & Multiplayer

---

Get ready to draw your blade, raise your shield, and prove your strength in every duel.
**No spells. No machines. Just skill.**

---
